channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 225,000 — Modern 4-Bed Arlington Home with Island Kitchen & Borehole (Arlington, Harare South)
item.description: USD 225,000 — Arlington, Harare South. 4 beds, 3 baths. Modern 4-Bed Arlington Home with Island Kitchen & Borehole. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
